title: Item detector
description: Don't let the smugglers go any further than they've gone!
body:
# Description

Item detector is a small mod that adds one block and one item. With the object detector, you can identify players with similar objects.

# Using

To set up the item detector, you need to enter the password in the item detector controller, and bind the password by clicking on the detector to bind the password. After that, you will be able to select nine items that the detector will respond to. When the object detector is triggered, it will emit a redstone signal.
